descriptionEn: Meaning of name: "mortal" or "frail." A son of Seth and a grandson of Adam. Also spelled "Enosh." He lived 905 years. Men began to call on the name of the Lord at this time (Genesis 4:26).

verses.line: And to Seth, to him also there was born a son; and he called his name Enos: then began men to call upon the name of the LORD.
And Seth lived an hundred and five years, and begat Enos:
And all the days of Enos were nine hundred and five years: and he died.
